display.purpose: Page titles only. Fixed 1.75rem, no fluid clamp.

label.purpose: Table headers, metadata, data source footers.

data.purpose: Scores, points, goal difference. Tabular alignment.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, popovers, mobile bottom sheets only.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Score updates, rank changes, section reveals.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Staggered section entrance on page load.

motion.name: stagger-step
motion.purpose: Delay between sibling list item reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — scenario explore, retry on error.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; background: #c41230; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #9e0e26; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.19 355 / 0.25); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; background: transparent; color: #1a1517; padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f4f5; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.19 355 / 0.25); }

components.name: Status Pill — Advance
components.html: 진출 확정
components.css: .ds-pill-advance { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background: #e6f5ee; color: #0d6b3f; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Status Pill — Conditional
components.html: 조건부
components.css: .ds-pill-conditional { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background: #fef8e6; color: #9a6700; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Match Row
components.description: Single match in schedule list — time, teams, score, venue.
components.html:
19:00
대한민국2 – 1체코
과달라하라
components.css: .ds-match-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2dfe0; min-height: 48px; } .ds-match-time { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #5c5658; min-width: 48px; } .ds-match-teams { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex: 1; } .ds-team { font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1517; } .ds-score { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1517; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; min-width: 56px; text-align: center; } .ds-match-venue { font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #5c5658; }

components.name: Standings Row — Korea Highlight
components.description: Group standings table row with Korea team highlight.
components.html: 2대한민국21012203
components.css: .ds-standings-row { height: 48px; } .ds-standings-row td { font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2dfe0; } .ds-standings-korea { background: #f5f4f5; border-left: 3px solid #c41230; } .ds-standings-korea .ds-team-name { font-weight: 600; color: #1a1517; } .ds-rank, .ds-stat, .ds-pts { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-align: center; color: #1a1517; } .ds-pts { font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Data Source Footer
components.description: Source attribution below every data block.
components.css: .ds-source { font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #5c5658; margin: 8px 0 0; }

components.name: Mobile Tab Nav
components.description: Fixed bottom navigation for mobile match-day use.
components.html: 홈경기시나리오팀
components.css: .ds-tab-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; align-items: center; height: 64px; background: #ffffff; border-top: 1px solid #e2dfe0; position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0); } .ds-tab { font-family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #5c5658; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-tab-active { color: #c41230; border-bottom-color: #c41230; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview: 경기장 피날레 직전, 관중석에서 스마트폰을 꺼내는 순간 — 화면은 순백, 숫자가 먼저 말하고, 태극기 레드는 한국과 진출 상태에만 쓰인다. 사용자가 궁금해하는 것만 앞에 두고, Choreographed 모션은 스코어 갱신·순위 변화에만 적용한다.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: OKLCH L 0.84–0.97, C < 0.06, hue 40–100 웜 뉴트럴 배경 금지.

rules.name: The White-On-Red Rule
rules.body: primary·success·danger 채움 위 텍스트는 항상 흰색.

rules.name: The Korea-Only Red Rule
rules.body: primary red는 한국 팀·한국 CTA·진출 확정에만.

rules.name: The Tabular Score Rule
rules.body: 모든 경기 숫자는 data 폰트 또는 tabular-nums.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: 제품 UI display에 fluid clamp 금지.

dos: Do 화면 최상단에 Curiosity Block을 배치한다.
Do 모든 데이터 블록에 소스·갱신 시각을 표기한다.
Do 스코어 갱신에 300ms ease-out-expo 전환을 쓴다.
Do 진출 상태를 색상+아이콘+한글 라벨로 표현한다.
donts: Don't SaaS 대시보드처럼 보이게 한다 — 회색 카드 그리드, 히어로 메트릭, 아이콘+제목+설명 반복 카드.
Don't 뉴스 포털처럼 광고 밀집·기사 나열형 레이아웃을 쓴다.
Don't 게임/베팅 UI처럼 네온·과한 그라데이션·글래스모피즘을 쓴다.
Don't AI 슬롭 — 크림/베이지 바디, 섹션마다 작은 대문자 eyebrow, 그라데이션 텍스트.
Don't 더미·목업 데이터로 빈 화면을 채운다.
